name: Johnson Transport Inc
recent_news: No school-bus or student-transportation activity identified. The 989 phone indicates mid-Michigan; the johnsontransportinc.com website describes a non-emergency medical / ambulatory passenger and airport-shuttle service operating in metro Detroit (35-mile radius). Multiple distinct 'Johnson Transport' entities exist in MI (Detroit freight USDOT 1630121 is separate).
fit_notes: Not a fit. Appears to be NEMT/ambulatory medical transport, not a school-bus contractor. SPED=1 flag in source data likely reflects medical/wheelchair NEMT, not student transport. Skip for Summit tuck-in.

name: At Your Svc Transportation
recent_news: No web footprint, no website, no news, and no GA Secretary of State filing surfaced under this exact name. 703 Prada Ct, Lawrenceville is listed in Yellow Pages directories as a special-needs / transportation address but the operating entity is unclear. Kenneth Gober does not appear publicly tied to any specific company; the surname overlaps with unrelated 'Gober Transport' (Marietta trucking). Small (~26 employees, $2.7M revenue, 2014 formation).
fit_notes: Likely SPED/NEMT micro-operator in Gwinnett County area, not a school-bus district contractor. GCPS runs its own buses in-house. Possible niche SPED contract play but very small; low priority tuck-in. Requires direct outreach to confirm services and ownership.

name: Able Transport Svc
recent_news: No website, no news, and no FMCSA passenger-carrier match surfaced. Nampa School District uses First Student for K-12 routes (per public reporting), so this is not a district contractor. Listed at 1327 E Amity Ave, Nampa; surrounded by NEMT/wheelchair providers in the area. Small (~22 employees, ~$1.1M revenue, founded 2006).
fit_notes: Probable NEMT/wheelchair-medical operator rather than a yellow-bus contractor. Nampa SD is locked up by First Student, limiting school-bus tuck-in upside. Not a Summit fit unless confirmed to run SPED bus routes; even then sub-scale.

name: Alternative Transportation
recent_news: Founded ~2004 (20+ years per company website); 'decades-old, multigenerational family business'. FMCSA shows ALTERNATIVE TRANSPORTATION SYSTEMS INC (USDOT 1786780, MC-651038) HQ at 815 Woburn St, Wilmington MA - 57 power units, 45 drivers, interstate passenger authority, active. The Groton, CT address in the source row is a satellite/operating location; HQ is Massachusetts. Markets MA 7D school transportation alongside NEMT/wheelchair across New England.
fit_notes: Mixed-model NEMT + 7D school van operator across New England with ~57 vehicles and a long-tenured family owner-president (Ed Farrell). Multi-modal (school van, SPED, wheelchair, NEMT) - not a traditional yellow-bus contractor but plausibly attractive as a New England SPED/alt-transport tuck-in for Summit. Note: source row tags it as CT, but actual HQ is Wilmington, MA. Worth a low-touch outreach.

name: West Coast Transportation Inc
recent_news: westcoasttransportation.com is parked/for-sale at HugeDomains - signal the operating business is dormant or defunct. No FMCSA passenger-carrier record matches the Palm Desert PO Box; the active USDOT 3062296 'WEST COAST TRANSPORTATION INC' is a 3-truck freight carrier in Mendota, CA (not Palm Desert and not passengers). Palm Desert / Coachella Valley K-12 transportation is dominated by Desert Sands USD in-house fleet, Palm Springs USD's contractor Zum Services, and charter operators - no public record of a 'West Coast Transportation' school-bus contract.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Likely dormant / very small charter or limo entity; not a school-bus contractor. Domain is for sale and Coachella Valley K-12 contracts are held by Zum and the districts themselves. Skip.
